panels.description: Take the last number of instances that are not 0 points.
panels.title: Number of Instances (Real-Time)

renameByName.Value #E: Number of bytes received by network
renameByName.Value #F: Number of bytes sent by network

panels.title: Provided Service Ranking of Average Duration (Top5)

renameByName.Value #E: Number of bytes received by network
renameByName.Value #F: Number of bytes sent by network

panels.description: Displays the interface indicators of service in the selected time period.

targets.expr: sum by (rpc) (sum_over_time_lorc(arms_exception_requests_count_raw{app="$service"}[$__range])) or on (rpc) group by (rpc) (max_over_time_lorc(arms_app_requests_count_ign_destid_endpoint_ppid_prpc{app="$service",callKind=~"$fullIncallKinds"}[$__range]))-1

max by (rpc) (max_over_time_lorc(arms_http_requests_latency_seconds{app="$service",quantile="0.75"}[$__range])) or on (rpc) group by (rpc) (max_over_time_lorc(arms_app_requests_count_ign_destid_endpoint_ppid_prpc{app="$service",callKind=~"$fullIncallKinds"}[$__range]))-1

max by (rpc) (max_over_time_lorc(arms_http_requests_latency_seconds{app="$service",quantile="0.9"}[$__range])) or on (rpc) group by (rpc) (max_over_time_lorc(arms_app_requests_count_ign_destid_endpoint_ppid_prpc{app="$service",callKind=~"$fullIncallKinds"}[$__range]))-1

max by (rpc) (max_over_time_lorc(arms_http_requests_latency_seconds{app="$service",quantile="0.99"}[$__range])) or on (rpc) group by (rpc) (max_over_time_lorc(arms_app_requests_count_ign_destid_endpoint_ppid_prpc{app="$service",callKind=~"$fullIncallKinds"}[$__range]))-1

panels.title: Summary of Interface Indicators (Selected Time Periods)
Average response time per minute for application-dependent services
Average response time per minute for application provision services

matcher.options: .*Mem Usage$|.*Mem Use$|.*Mem Limit$|.*Mem Requirements$|.*Disk Usage$|.*Disk Limit$
